description: Local command allowlist for SafeSubprocessRunner. It allows controlled pytest runs and read-only git apply --check patch preflight.

commands.description: Allow controlled pytest invocation without shell=True. Suffix args such as -q, a test path or --version are permitted after the prefix.
Allow read-only patch applicability checks with git apply --check. Suffix args may include one workspace-relative patch file; the command never applies patches.
